subcodes.first_line: Concerning the customary payment that had been previously written of, the intention thereof was that His Holiness would unto them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در باره وجه معهود که از قبل نوشته شده بود مقصود آن بود که آنحضرت آنچه بایشان
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @business; financial; property matters
